queries.query: The API gateway doc is technically accurate but unreadable. Make it understandable for partner engineers.
Write an architecture overview that explains why event sourcing changes how debugging works.
Make this incident explanation accessible to customer success without hiding the tradeoffs.
Explain our new import feature with a concrete Terraform example and no hype.
Create step-by-step setup docs for the SDK.
Draft a proposal asking leadership to fund a documentation rewrite.
Write a formal benchmark report from these latency measurements.
Build a data dictionary for these event payload fields.
